domainDetection.reasoning: The documents consistently highlight themes central to Customer Success, including customer renewal dates, adoption metrics (NPS, CSAT), onboarding issues, executive sponsor engagement in quarterly reviews, customer escalations due to dissatisfaction, and potential expansion opportunities linked to customer success and product adoption.

executionPlanReasoning: Fallback planner selected agents using deterministic rules.

evidence: Customer stated they may not renew.
Auto renewal is disabled - manual renewal required.

retrievedKnowledge.title: Executive Business Review (EBR) Playbook
retrievedKnowledge.content: When a customer exhibits high churn risk signals (NPS < 5, adoption < 40%, or explicit renewal concerns), initiate an Executive Business Review within 7 days. The EBR should include the customer's executive sponsor and your internal VP of Customer Success. Agenda: review ROI achieved, address top concerns, present renewal roadmap. Prepare a slide deck with usage metrics, outcomes delivered, and a 12-month value roadmap.

retrievedKnowledge.title: Discount and Retention Incentive Playbook
retrievedKnowledge.content: If a customer is at renewal risk and discount is permitted by contract, offer a tiered retention incentive: (1) 5% for 1-year renewal, (2) 10% for 2-year renewal, (3) 15% for 3-year renewal plus white-glove onboarding. Never lead with discounts - first establish value, then use discount as a closing lever. Get VP approval before offering >10%.

retrievedKnowledge.title: Low Adoption Intervention Playbook
retrievedKnowledge.content: If product adoption falls below 50%, schedule an Adoption Workshop within 14 days. Identify the top 3 unused features relevant to the customer's use case. Assign a Solutions Engineer to run a hands-on training session. Follow up with a 30-day adoption improvement plan and weekly check-ins. Measure adoption weekly post-workshop.

scenarios.name: Strategic EBR, Adoption Workshop & Analytics Deep Dive
scenarios.summary: Execute the customer's requested Executive Business Review within 7 days, involving internal and customer executives to address overall satisfaction, ROI, and future roadmap. Simultaneously, initiate an Accelerated Adoption Program, including a hands-on workshop led by a Solutions Engineer to improve onboarding and feature usage. Integrate a detailed discussion and demo of the Analytics Module, positioning it as a key solution to their data needs and a driver for increased value and adoption.

scenarios.name: Accelerated Adoption Program & Value Validation (Pre-EBR)
scenarios.summary: Prioritize an intensive 30-day Accelerated Adoption Program, including a hands-on workshop led by a Solutions Engineer to immediately address onboarding frustrations and low feature usage. Defer the Executive Business Review until demonstrable adoption improvements can be presented, aiming to build positive momentum. Once improvements are validated, schedule the EBR to review progress, reinforce value, and discuss the Analytics Module as a further enhancement.

scenarios.name: Proactive Discounted Renewal Offer & Analytics Pitch
scenarios.summary: Immediately acknowledge customer dissatisfaction and proactively offer a tiered discount (e.g., 10-15%) for a multi-year renewal to secure the contract and mitigate immediate churn risk. Simultaneously, pitch the Analytics Module as a solution to their data visibility problems, hoping it will drive future perceived value. Postpone deeper operational reviews and adoption workshops until the renewal is secured, focusing on the financial incentive to retain the customer.

bestScenario.name: Strategic EBR, Adoption Workshop & Analytics Deep Dive
bestScenario.summary: Execute the customer's requested Executive Business Review within 7 days, involving internal and customer executives to address overall satisfaction, ROI, and future roadmap. Simultaneously, initiate an Accelerated Adoption Program, including a hands-on workshop led by a Solutions Engineer to improve onboarding and feature usage. Integrate a detailed discussion and demo of the Analytics Module, positioning it as a key solution to their data needs and a driver for increased value and adoption.

devilsAdvocateReview.scenarioName: Strategic EBR, Adoption Workshop & Analytics Deep Dive
potentialWeaknesses: Potential revenue impact from the selected option.
The selected scenario may create customer expectations that are hard to sustain.
longTermDisadvantages: Margin pressure could harm future renewal negotiations.
It may reduce ability to pursue higher-value upsell opportunities.
revenueTradeOffs: Short-term renewal may come at the cost of long-term revenue growth.
customerRelationshipRisks: Customers may expect similar concessions in the next cycle.

alternative.name: Quarterly Payment Plan
alternative.summary: A balanced approach that preserves revenue while improving renewal probability.

devilsAdvocateReview.finalVerdict: The selected scenario should be reviewed for risk; a more balanced alternative may be preferable.
